title: Make DSResult generic — DSResult<T> to eliminate 102 unchecked snapshot casts
acceptanceCriteria: DSResult<T> generic in types.ts
All 33 engine functions return typed DSResult<ConcreteState>
Zero `snapshot as` casts in DataStructuresModule.tsx
TypeScript compiles with no errors
createSegmentTree/createFenwickTree return concrete state, not DSResult wrapper

title: Derive ActiveDS from DS_CATALOG using const assertion — auto-track new DS
acceptanceCriteria: ActiveDS derived from DS_CATALOG, not manually maintained
Adding a DS to DS_CATALOG without updating switches causes compile error
All switch statements use exhaustive never check
DSCategory also derived from DS_CATALOG

title: Replace global singleton _stepId/_nodeIdCounter with local step recorder
acceptanceCriteria: Zero module-level _stepId variables in any engine file
Each operation function creates a local step recorder
Vector-clock send+receive chain has correct sequential step IDs
All existing tests pass
No resetStepId() function needed

title: Remove layout coordinates x?/y? from domain node types (BST, AVL, RB)
description:
BSTNode, AVLNode, and RBNode carry `x?: number; y?: number` fields that belong in the layout layer (PositionedNode), not the domain model. These fields are only set by tree-layout.ts and pollute cloneBST/cloneAVL. FibNode, SplayNode, TreapNode correctly have NO layout fields.

Fix: Remove x?/y? from BSTNode (bst-ds.ts:15-16), AVLNode (avl-ds.ts:17-18), RBNode (red-black-ds.ts:21-22). The layout engine maps domain nodes → PositionedNode which already holds x/y as required fields.

Update canvas components to use PositionedNode from layout output, not node.x/node.y.
acceptanceCriteria: BSTNode, AVLNode, RBNode have no x/y fields
PositionedNode has required x, y (not optional)
Canvas components read x, y from layout output
cloneBST/cloneAVL no longer copy layout coordinates
All visualizations render identically

title: Add discriminated union to MerkleNode matching BPlusNode pattern
acceptanceCriteria: MerkleNode is a discriminated union with kind: 'leaf' | 'internal'
Leaf nodes have required data field
Internal nodes have required left/right children
All merkle-tree.ts functions updated to use discriminant narrowing
MerkleTreeCanvas visualization unchanged

title: Create typed highlight state union replacing unguarded string in DS_COLORS
description:
DS_COLORS at DataStructuresModule.tsx:402 is `Record<string, string>`. getHighlight at :419 returns `string`. Engines emit highlight values like 'visiting', 'inserting', 'deleting' as unguarded strings in DSMutation.to. If an engine emits a typo ('inserrting'), the canvas gets undefined color silently.

Fix: Define a typed union:
```typescript
type DSHighlightState = 'default' | 'comparing' | 'visiting' | 'visited' | 'inserting' | 'done' | 'deleting' | 'shifting' | 'found' | 'hashing' | 'already-set' | 'setting' | 'not-found' | 'updating';
const DS_COLORS: Record<DSHighlightState, string> = { ... };
```
Update DSMutation.to to use this union. TypeScript catches typos at compile time.
acceptanceCriteria: DSHighlightState union type defined with all valid states
DS_COLORS typed as Record<DSHighlightState, string>
DSMutation uses DSHighlightState for highlight property values
getHighlight returns DSHighlightState, not string
Engine files get compile errors on misspelled highlight states

title: Standardize function naming convention across all 33 engine files
description:
Four distinct naming patterns exist across engine files:
- ds prefix: dsBstInsert, dsAvlDelete, dsRbSearch
- No prefix: hashInsert, heapInsert, bloomInsert
- Short prefix: llInsertHead, cbEnqueue, cmsInsert
- CRDT-name prefix: gCounterIncrement, pnCounterDecrement

Pick ONE convention and apply consistently. Recommendation: `{dsName}{Operation}` pattern (e.g., bstInsert, avlDelete, hashInsert, trieSearch). Drop the `ds` prefix — it's redundant since all files are in lib/data-structures/.

This is a breaking API change for the barrel export — use search-and-replace across all consumers.
acceptanceCriteria: All engine functions follow {dsName}{Operation} naming convention
Barrel export in index.ts updated with new names
DataStructuresModule.tsx imports updated
All test files updated
Zero TypeScript compilation errors

title: Convert DSModuleState to useReducer with typed action discriminated union
acceptanceCriteria: State managed by useReducer, not useState
Actions are discriminated union with per-DS operation types
Zero `snapshot as` casts in reducer (each case knows concrete type)
handleOperation/handleRandom/handleReset consolidated into single reducer
Dead `applyResult` callback removed
Reducer is unit-testable in isolation
